# The Calculator Page
> Free, accurate financial and everyday calculators for UK users and beyond.

The Calculator Page (https://www.thecalculatorpage.com) provides 40+ free calculators and unit converters covering personal finance, mortgages, investments, and everyday maths. All tools are browser-based, require no login, and are designed for the UK market but usable globally.

## Key Calculators

- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/compound-interest): Calculate how investments grow over time with compound interest. Supports monthly/annual compounding and regular contributions.
- [UK Salary Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/salary): Calculate take-home pay after UK income tax and National Insurance deductions.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/mortgage): Calculate monthly mortgage repayments based on loan amount, interest rate, and term.
- [Retirement Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/retirement): Plan retirement income, estimate pension pot size, and model drawdown scenarios.
- [Mortgage Overpayment Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/mortgage-overpayment): See how overpaying your mortgage reduces interest and shortens the term.
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/stamp-duty): Calculate UK Stamp Duty Land Tax (SDLT) for property purchases.
- [Savings Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/savings): Project savings growth with regular deposits and interest.
- [Loan Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/loan): Calculate monthly repayments and total interest on personal loans.
- [APY Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/apy): Convert APR to Annual Percentage Yield.
- [Budget Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/budget): Build and track a monthly budget.
- [Car Loan Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/car-loan): Calculate car finance repayments.
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/simple-interest): Calculate simple interest on savings or loans.
- [Credit Card Payoff Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/credit-card-payoff): Plan how to pay off credit card debt.
- [IRR Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/irr): Calculate the Internal Rate of Return on investments.
- [VAT Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/vat-calculator): Add or remove UK VAT at 20%, 5% or 0%. Instant results for invoices and tax returns.
- [ISA Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/isa-calculator): Compare Cash ISA, Stocks & Shares ISA and Lifetime ISA returns. Includes LISA government bonus.
- [Capital Gains Tax Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/capital-gains-tax): Work out CGT on shares, property and other assets with 2024/25 rates and annual exempt amount.
- [Inheritance Tax Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/finance/inheritance-tax): Estimate IHT on your estate including nil rate band, residence nil rate band and spouse exemption.
- [Days From Today Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/days-from-today): Find exact dates for 30, 60, 90 or any number of days from today or in the past.
- [Working Days Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/working-days): Count business days between dates excluding weekends and UK bank holidays.
- [BMI Calculator UK](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/bmi-calculator): Free BMI calculator using NHS categories. Supports stone+lbs and metric.
- [Calorie Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/calorie-calculator): Find daily calorie needs using Mifflin-St Jeor. Shows BMR, TDEE, weight loss and gain targets.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/percentage): Calculate percentages, percentage of a number, and percentage change.
- [Age Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/age): Calculate exact age from a date of birth.
- [Discount Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/discount): Calculate sale prices and savings from discounts.
- [Tip Calculator](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/misc/tip): Calculate tips and split bills.

## Unit Converters

- [Length Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/length)
- [Weight Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/weight)
- [Temperature Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/temperature)
- [Stone to KG Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/stone-to-kg): Convert between stone, pounds and kilograms instantly.
- [Cups to Grams Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/cups-to-grams): Convert cups to grams for baking. Flour, sugar, butter and more with ingredient-specific weights.
- [CM to Inches Converter](https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/converters/cm-to-inches): Convert centimetres to inches and back. Includes feet+inches breakdown for heights.

## About

- Website: https://www.thecalculatorpage.com
- Contact: thecalculatorpage@gmail.com
- Sitemap: https://www.thecalculatorpage.com/sitemap.xml
- Focus: UK personal finance, mortgages, investments, everyday calculations
- Audience: UK adults managing personal finances, first-time buyers, investors, savers
